text.title: Static Application Security Testing (SAST) in CI/CD Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-tool
step.action: GitHub + semantic accuracy → CodeQL; cross-platform + custom rules → Semgrep; OSS-heavy → Snyk Code; code-quality combo → SonarQube.

step.name: pin
step.action: Pin scanner image / action + rule pack to a release tag or SHA.

step.name: baseline
step.action: If repo ≥6 months: configure baseline (ignore-existing). If greenfield: fail-on-existing.

step.name: wire-pr-gate
step.action: Make the SAST step a required check on the protected branch.

step.name: upload-sarif
step.action: Add upload-sarif step; verify findings appear in the Security tab.
